title: The most insane week in AI
summary: Video overview of recent AI developments across multiple domains including new model releases from DeepSeek, OpenAI, Kimi, Xiaomi, and Alibaba Qwen, alongside research projects in game engines, geometry understanding, image generation, and video editing. The content emphasizes rapid innovation velocity and breadth of AI applications from language models to robotics.
